---
title: Presentation Title
subtitle: A clean subtitle for context
format:
  pjk_theme-revealjs:
    center: true
author: Jonas Kreutzer
date: last-modified
---

## Introduction

This template demonstrates the **pjk_theme** for RevealJS presentations.

Designed for clarity and consistency when presenting.

## Text & Emphasis

Regular text for the body of your slides.

[Highlighted point]{.text-emphasis} draws attention.

Use `.font-mono` for `inline code` or [technical terms]{.font-mono}.

## Blockquote

> Research is what I'm doing when I don't know what I'm doing.
>
> --- Wernher von Braun

## Code

```python
def greet(name: str) -> str:
    return f"Hello, {name}!"
```

## Tables {.smaller}

| Method | Precision | Recall | F1 |
|--------|-----------|--------|----|
| Baseline | 0.72 | 0.68 | 0.70 |
| Proposed | **0.89** | **0.85** | **0.87** |

: Model comparison {.small}

# Section Break {.has-dark-background}

## Citations

Results are consistent with prior work.

[Source: Author et al. (2024)]{.slide-cite}

## Utility Classes

::: {.v-center-container}
[Centered content]{.text-emphasis} using `.v-center-container`
:::

## Links & Resources

Learn more about [Quarto presentations](https://quarto.org/docs/presentations/revealjs/).

::: {.right}
Right-aligned text with `.right`
:::
